overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing the protagonist Bayek walking through an ancient Egyptian city at night. The character moves from cobblestone streets through courtyards and narrow alleys, eventually ascending a grand staircase toward a temple complex illuminated by torchlight and moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient city street transitioning to mosaic courtyard

events.description: character walks from cobblestone street into a courtyard with mosaic tile flooring

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the ancient city street and entering the courtyard, passing by torch-lit buildings

notable_agents.action: child in blue robe walking across the courtyard
child in grey tunic standing in the courtyard center

entered.detail: two-story stone building with red awning and wooden doors
irregular stone paving on the ground surface
tall stone pillar with burning flame at the top
intricate geometric tile pattern in red and white stone
grand building entrance with tall stone columns and lit doorway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cobblestone street in an ancient city at night, with stone buildings and torchlight. The character walks forward, passing a child in blue, and enters a courtyard with an elaborate mosaic floor pattern. Another child stands in the center as the character approaches a columned building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between high stone walls

events.description: character enters a narrow walled passage between buildings, leaving the open courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking through a confined narrow passage between high stone walls, moving toward a distant light

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground against the wall near a torch at the passage end

entered.detail: tall weathered stone walls on both sides creating a corridor
compacted earth ground surface between the walls
burning torch mounted on the wall at the passage end

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow enclosed alley between high stone walls, leaving the open courtyard behind. The path is dimly lit with dirt ground, and at the far end, a seated figure rests against the wall near a burning torch. The walls create a confined corridor leading toward an exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden path with trees leading to open plaza

events.description: character exits the narrow alley into a garden area with trees and open sky

agents.ego_description: walking along a garden path flanked by trees and walls, approaching a distant plaza with buildings

entered.detail: tall leafy trees lining the path on both sides
palm trees visible in the distance near the plaza
round colonnaded structure with red and white pillars visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow passage, the scene opens into a garden area with trees lining a dirt path. The sky is visible above, and in the distance, a circular rotunda structure and palm trees mark the approach to a larger plaza. The character continues walking toward the open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: formal temple plaza with rotunda and statues

events.description: character turns right around the rotunda structure to approach the temple stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through a grand plaza with statues and a circular rotunda, then turning toward a monumental staircase

entered.detail: classical stone statues on pedestals flanking the plaza
ornate stone tile pattern on the plaza ground
tall pointed stone monument rising in the distance
wide stone staircase leading up to the temple entrance

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide formal plaza with decorative stone paving, passing a circular rotunda with red columns. Stone statues and burning braziers line the approach to a grand staircase leading up to a temple. The character turns right around the rotunda and heads toward the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand temple staircase with fluted columns

events.description: character begins ascending the grand staircase toward the temple entrance

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide stone staircase flanked by tall columns and statues, approaching the temple entrance

entered.detail: tall white stone columns with vertical fluting lining the stairs
monumental entrance with columns and pediment at the top of the stairs
sculpted lion figure on a pedestal beside the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character begins ascending a grand staircase toward a temple entrance, flanked by tall fluted columns and stone lion statues. The stairs are wide and paved with stone, leading up to the monumental temple entrance visible at the top. The scene is lit by moonlight and burning braziers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nocturnal Egyptian city, transitioning from narrow residential streets into a grand, open temple complex. It begins on a torchlit cobblestone street, moving past a child in blue and into a courtyard featuring an elaborate mosaic floor. As the character leaves the open courtyard, the scene shifts into a dimly lit, confined alley with high stone walls and a seated figure resting by a torch before opening up into a garden area lined with trees and palm trees. The path then expands into a wide formal plaza with decorative paving and a red-columned rotunda, where burning braziers light the way toward a monumental structure. Finally, the camera follows the ascent up a grand stone staircase flanked by fluted columns and lion statues, leading toward the temple entrance under the glow of the moonlight.
